constraints.name: divisibility
constraints.description: 每个数组元素只能通过增加或减少固定整数 x 进行变换,因此元素在变换过程中模 x 的余数保持不变,只能被重映射到与其初始值同余的非负整数集合中。

constraints.name: range_bound
constraints.description: 经过任意次合法操作后,数组中的所有元素值必须保持为非负整数。

objective.description: Maximize the minimum excluded non-negative integer of an array after each incremental update, where elements can be adjusted by integer multiples of a fixed value.

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: The constructible prefix length is non-decreasing across updates. The algorithm maintains a forward-only pointer that advances sequentially as long as the required resource count for the current position is available, never retreating.

invariants.name: equivalence_class
invariants.description: The permitted arithmetic operations preserve values modulo a fixed integer. The algorithm partitions elements into disjoint classes based on this modulus and maintains a frequency count per class, enabling deterministic greedy allocation to sequential positions.
